title: potentilla heterosepala
intro: Potentilla heterosepala, also known as Five-fingered cinquefoil, is a flowering plant species in the rose family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Potentilla heterosepala can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
